main.description: Find actors (directory search) for a search term. v1 matches a case-insensitive prefix of the handle — enough for an @-picker that filters as the user types. Mirrors app.bsky.actor.searchActors with a minimal output shape. Public read — no auth, matching getAuthorFeed/getPostThread.

q.description: Search term (at least 1 char), prefix-matched case-insensitively against the handle. Empty is rejected — the picker shows followed/recent on empty input, not the whole directory.

limit.description: Maximum number of actors to return.

actorBasic.description: Minimal actor view for directory results — mirrors app.bsky.actor.defs#profileViewBasic. Avatar deferred for v1 (an @-picker needs handle + name).
